attributes.additional_details: Women shouldn't have to pay for things they cannot control. Women, who are homeless, bleed out through their clothes because they cant afford period products. We, as Women and girls should not have to pay for products to help with this menstrual thing that we cannot control! This needs to be changed!
attributes.background: Change period products such as pads and tampons for free!

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign the following petitions, which call for similar action:

Fund and distribute first-period boxes through schools and healthcare settings
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757823

Fund free female sanitary products for all women and girls
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756958

Fund free female sanitary products in Public Restrooms
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/741219
